message: fix(git): add checked-out branch support to `gbg*` (#12397)
removed_lines: -alias gbgd='LANG=C git branch --no-color -vv | grep ": gone\]" | awk '"'"'{print $1}'"'"' | xargs git branch -d'
-alias gbgD='LANG=C git branch --no-color -vv | grep ": gone\]" | awk '"'"'{print $1}'"'"' | xargs git branch -D'
added_lines: +alias gbgd='LANG=C git branch --no-color -vv | grep ": gone\]" | cut -c 3- | awk '"'"'{print $1}'"'"' | xargs git branch -d'
+alias gbgD='LANG=C git branch --no-color -vv | grep ": gone\]" | cut -c 3- | awk '"'"'{print $1}'"'"' | xargs git branch -D'

message:
Plugin jump: autocompletion for numbers and dots

This change fixes the autocompletion for marks which contain numbers or dots.

Fixes #2578

`\d` in sed regular expressions doesn't work (see http://stackoverflow.com/questions/14671293/why-does-d-doesnt-work-in-regular-expression-in-sed)

removed_lines: -alias gunwip='git log -n 1 | grep -q -c "--wip--" && git reset HEAD~1'
added_lines: +alias gunwip='git log -n 1 | grep -q -c "\--wip--" && git reset HEAD~1'

message: fix(aws): allow non-space characters in profile names (#11040)
fix: quote % characters in ruby prompt info functions

archlinux: fix pacweb breaking when multiple packages found (#9059)
